en.extract:
The white-tailed ant thrush (Neocossyphus poensis), also known as the white-tailed rufous thrush, is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is widespread across the African tropical rainforest.

The '''white-tailed ant thrush''' ('''''Neocossyphus poensis'''''), also known as the '''white-tailed rufous thrush''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Turdidae]]. It is widespread across the [[Tropical rainforest|African tropical rainforest]].
